feed.title: UP
feed.subtitle: 这是一个博客,也是一个发牢骚的地方,而且不希望被太多人知道...

entry.title: 智能指针 现代C++
entry.content:
唔...能看懂一点...

在新式C++编程中，标准库包含智能指针，这些指针用于帮助确保程序不会出现内存和资源泄漏，并具有异常安全。

智能指针（现代 C++）- Microsoft

entry.title: OpenCV4.2 + CUDA 测试代码cvtColor()
entry.content:
#include <iostream>

#include <opencv2/core.hpp>
#include <opencv2/highgui.hpp>
#include <opencv2/imgproc.hpp>
#include <opencv2/dnn.hpp>
#include <opencv2/opencv.hpp>
#include <opencv2/core/cuda.hpp>

using namespace std;
using namespace cv;
using namespace cv::cuda;

int main()
{
	// cout << getBuildInformation() << endl;
	

	int num_devices = getCudaEnabledDeviceCount();
	if(num_devices <= 0)
	{
		cout << "There is no device." << endl;
		return -1;
	}

	int enable_device_id = -1;
	for(int i = 0; i < num_devices; i++)
	{
		DeviceInfo dev_info(i);
		if(dev_info.isCompatible())
		{
			enable_device_id = i;
		}
	}

	if(enable_device_id < 0)
	{
		cout << "GPU module isn't built for GPU" << endl;
		return -1;
	}
	setDevice(enable_device_id);

	Mat src_image = imread("/home/sau/Pictures/dji-robomaster-s1-robot-4.jpg");
	Mat dst_image;
	cv::cuda::GpuMat d_src_img(src_image);
	cv::cuda::GpuMat d_dst_img;
	cv::cuda::cvtColor(d_src_img, d_dst_img, COLOR_BGR2GRAY);
	d_dst_img.download(dst_image);
	cv::imshow("test", dst_image);
	
	waitKey(0);
	return 0;
}

entry.title: 卸载opencv
entry.content:
cd  build
sudo make uninstall
sudo rm * -rf
sudo rm -r /usr/local/include/opencv2 /usr/local/include/opencv /usr/include/opencv /usr/include/opencv2 /usr/local/share/opencv /usr/local/share/OpenCV /usr/share/opencv /usr/share/OpenCV /usr/local/bin/opencv* /usr/local/lib/libopencv*

References

ubuntu --重装opencv :opencv4+cuda10+contrib

entry.title: 绘制R字母的中心点，并存储在传入的参数中
entry.content:
// birief 绘制R字母的中心点，并把中心坐标存储在第三个参数中
// param InputArray 输入的图像，也就是要检测的图像
// param OutputArray 输出的图像，也就是R字母要绘制在哪个图像上
// parameter Rcenter 存储R字母坐标的点
void drawRcenter(Mat InputArray, Mat &OutputArray, Point2f &Rcenter)
{
	vector<vector<Point>> contours;
	vector<Vec4i> hierarchy;

	findContours(InputArray, contours, hierarchy, RETR_EXTERNAL, CHAIN_APPROX_SIMPLE);
	//cout << contours.size() << endl;
	for (size_t i = 0; i < contours.size(); ++i)
	{
		if (contourArea(contours[i]) > 180 && contourArea(contours[i]) < 200)
		{
			//cout << contourArea(contours[i]) << endl << endl;
			RotatedRect rRect = minAreaRect(contours[i]);
			Rcenter = rRect.center;
			circle(OutputArray, Rcenter, 3, Scalar(255, 0, 0), 2);
		}
	}
}

entry.title: Perspective-N-Point problem in camera pose estimation
entry.content:
P3P

相机位姿求解——P3P问题

这里面有余弦的求解方法

Reference

A Review of Solutions for Perspective-n-Point Problem in Camera Pose
Estimation
PnP 单目相机位姿估计（一）：初识PnP问题

entry.title: 对于fitEllipse()的理解
entry.content:
openCV 源代码

/** @example samples/cpp/fitellipse.cpp
An example using the fitEllipse technique
*/

/** @brief Fits an ellipse around a set of 2D points.

The function calculates the ellipse that fits (in a least-squares sense) a set of 2D points best of
all. It returns the rotated rectangle in which the ellipse is inscribed. The first algorithm described by @cite Fitzgibbon95
is used. Developer should keep in mind that it is possible that the returned
ellipse/rotatedRect data contains negative indices, due to the data points being close to the
border of the containing Mat element.

@param points Input 2D point set, stored in std::vector\<\> or Mat
 */
CV_EXPORTS_W RotatedRect fitEllipse( InputArray points );

需要注意的是他返回的是一个旋转矩形

拟合原理

想要拟合一个椭圆，必须满足点的个数至少为6个
OpenCV中的椭圆拟合事实上就是对Fitzgibbon提出的直接最小二乘拟合算法的实现，这是一种非迭代的椭圆拟合算法，可以参考论文：Direct least square fitting of ellipses,它要求拟合的点至少为6个点。

返回值的注意点

返回的是一个旋转矩形，但是角度却是0-180的，而且是以最短的边为基准

https://docs.opencv.org/3.1.0/d3/dc0/group__imgproc__shape.html#ga8740e7645628c59d238b0b22c2abe2d4

https://docs.opencv.org/3.1.0/d3/dc0/group__imgproc__shape.html#gaaf0eb9e10bd5adcbd446cd31fea2db68

好像版本号不太对

entry.title: void drawRotatedRect( /*param*/ )
entry.content:
绘制旋转矩形的自定义函数

// brief 绘制旋转矩形 by up
// param frame 直线绘制的图像
// param rRect 旋转矩形
// param color 矩形的颜色
// param thickness 矩形线条的线宽
void drawRotatedRect(Mat frame, RotatedRect rRect, Scalar color, int thickness = 1)
{
	//创建存储旋转矩形顶点的数组
	Point2f vertices[4];
	//存储顶点
	rRect.points(vertices);
	//绘制旋转矩形
	for (int j = 0; j < 4; ++j)
		line(frame, vertices[j], vertices[(j + 1) % 4], color, thickness);
}

2019/10/2 13:53

entry.title: openCV RotatedRect points、angle、width、height详解
entry.content:
opencv里对RotatedRect的定义，中文是翻译。

class CV_EXPORTS RotatedRect
{
public:
    //! default constructor
    // 默认构造函数
    RotatedRect();
    
    /** full constructor
    // 完整构造函数
    @param center The rectangle mass center.
           center 矩形的中心点
    @param size Width and height of the rectangle.
           size 矩形的宽度和高度
    @param angle The rotation angle in a clockwise direction. When the angle is 0, 90, 180, 270 etc.,
           angle 顺时针方向的旋转角度
    the rectangle becomes an up-right rectangle.
    矩形变成了右上的矩形
    */
    RotatedRect(const Point2f& center, const Size2f& size, float angle);
    
    /**
    Any 3 end points of the RotatedRect. They must be given in order (either clockwise or
    anticlockwise).
    RotatedRect的任意3个端点。它们必须按顺序给出(顺时针或逆时针)
     */
    RotatedRect(const Point2f& point1, const Point2f& point2, const Point2f& point3);

    /** returns 4 vertices of the rectangle
        返回矩形的4个顶点
    @param pts The points array for storing rectangle vertices. The order is bottomLeft, topLeft, topRight, bottomRight.
           pts 存储矩形顶点的数组，顺序是左下，左上，右上，右下
    */
    void points(Point2f pts[]) const;
    
    //! returns the minimal up-right integer rectangle containing the rotated rectangle
    //  返回一个包含旋转矩形的最小直立矩形，长宽都是整型
    Rect boundingRect() const;
    
    //! returns the minimal (exact) floating point rectangle containing the rotated rectangle, not intended for use with images
    
    Rect_<float> boundingRect2f() const;
    
    //! returns the rectangle mass center
    Point2f center;
    
    //! returns width and height of the rectangle
    Size2f size;
    
    //! returns the rotation angle. When the angle is 0, 90, 180, 270 etc., the rectangle becomes an up-right rectangle.
    float angle;
};

deference
Opencv RotatedRect类详解 - CSDN
